content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat at 24135 with mixed sector action — Metals and Energy leading, PSU Banks and Realty weak. VIX easing to 17.5 suggests calm, but TORNTPOWER reversed sharply intraday from 1816 to 1777 showing distribution at highs. Book is 60% deployed with positive but small unrealized P&L; priority is position management, not new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 3.8% but Q4 was strong (PAT +35%, NNPA 0.13%). CMP 78.42 still well above SL 76.50. Equity raise overhang explains pullback after run from 64 to 82. Hold with current SL — risk is contained at ~2.4% from CMP. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op check: current SL 1032.38 is already locking in ~5% gain on entry 984. CMP 1048.70 is above SL by 1.6%. Since values match the stored SL/target exactly, this would be a no-op — converting to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Mild loss -1.3%, still a useful hedge. SL at 119 gives ~3.6% room. FOMC and US data this week could reignite move. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 1.6% with strong Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%). At fresh 52w high 1437. Tighten SL from 1413 to 1418 — slight raise above entry to lock breakeven+. Thesis (FMCG volume-led recovery, sector leader) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.5%, Q4 results binary event Apr 30 (T+2). SL at 2295 is just 0.8% below CMP — risk well-contained. Holding into print since downside is capped by tight SL and Nestle read-through is positive for FMCG."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL 406 already at breakeven+, target 425 unchanged. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.2%. Stock printed 1816 high then reversed sharply to 1777 — distribution signal at 52w high after 39% MTD rally. SL at 1775 is just 0.1% below CMP — extremely tight. If SL hits we're out cleanly with small loss; if it holds, momentum can resume. Cannot loosen SL anyway. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 1.1% with 5.3x volume on Organon acquisition news. Tighten SL from 1720 to 1735 (just above entry 1734) to lock breakeven on this binary M&A name. Heavy debt overhang from $11.75bn deal is a real risk — protect downside."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Flat -0.4%. SL 318 is just 0.6% below CMP — already tight. Defensive transmission play near 52w high. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, hold through volatility. SL 76.50 below recent swing low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1032.38 locking ~5% gain. Approaching target 1095. Let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge function intact. FOMC week could re-ignite."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL just above entry to lock breakeven on a 52w high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2295 tight at 0.8%. Q4 print Apr 30 — let market decide."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 406 already at breakeven+. Working well."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Intraday reversal from 1816 to 1777 is a red flag at 52w high. SL 1775 is the line; cannot loosen. Accept binary outcome."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL above entry given M&A debt overhang. Lock breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 318 already tight. Defensive utility."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "COALINDIA strong Q4 but +4% move post-result reduces edge; HSBC flagged that profit beat was driven by other income, not core. AARTIIND breaking out near 52w high with $150M order book — watch for entry above 510 with SL below 488 if volume confirms tomorrow. PIRAMALFIN +10.7% on retail story but FY26 PAT bump was one-time gains — pass. INDIACEM 17.7x volume on declining price screams forced selling/block — avoid. GLENMARK is a SHORT candidate (max tariff exposure) but no MIS short setup today. MARUTI Q4 tonight — wait for reaction.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed with +0.17% session P&L. Power cluster (NTPC + TORNTPOWER + POWERGRID) totals ~17% of capital — at the upper edge of what I'm comfortable with given correlation to summer demand and rate sensitivity. NO new power names. FMCG cluster (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR) is ~17% — HUL Q4 in 2 days is the binary. Cash buffer 40% is healthy. Three pending CNC LIMIT orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) from prior session are still open — TATAPOWER would breach my power cluster cap, so I should not add to it. Will let pending orders work; not stacking duplicates. No new entries this tick — focus is on management."
}
